# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based frontend application for HR management, built with TypeScript and following component-driven architecture. The app uses a sidebar navigation layout with protected routes and integrates with Supabase for backend services.

## Key Technologies & Patterns

### Frontend Stack
- **React 18** with functional components and hooks
- **TypeScript** for type safety
- **Vite** for fast development and building
- **Tailwind CSS** for styling with custom design system
- **shadcn/ui** component library built on Radix UI primitives

### State Management
- **React Query** (@tanstack/react-query) for server state management
- **React Router DOM** for client-side routing
- **Context API** for authentication state

### Forms & Validation
- **React Hook Form** for form handling
- **Zod** for schema validation
- **@hookform/resolvers** for integration

### Backend Integration
- **Supabase** for database, authentication, and real-time features
- Environment variables for configuration

## Application Structure

### Routing & Navigation
- Root route (`/`) redirects to dashboard or login based on auth state
- Protected routes wrap content in `AppLayout` component
- Sidebar navigation with collapsible design
- Top bar displays current page title

### Layout Components
- `AppLayout`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and content area
- `AppSidebar`: Navigation sidebar with sections (MAIN, PEOPLE, FINANCE, WORK, SYSTEM)
- `TopBar`: Header component showing page titles
- `BeudoxLogo`: Logo component with variant support

### Authentication Flow
- `AuthProvider` manages session state
- `ProtectedRoute` component guards authenticated routes
- Password reset/set functionality for invites and recovery
- Loading states during auth checks

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap, renders App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing and providers

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout structure
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Page header with titles
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variants
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: React Router NavLink wrapper

### Configuration
- `package.json`: Dependencies and scripts
- `vite.config.ts`: Build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Styling configuration
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `.env`: Environment variables for Supabase

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/`: Supabase client and types
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication hook
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system

## Database Schema (Supabase)

The application uses Supabase with PostgreSQL. Key tables include:
- User authentication and profiles
- Employee information
- Attendance records
- Leave requests
- Payroll data
- Projects and evaluations

## Development Workflow

### Scripts
- `npm run dev`: Start Vite dev server
- `npm run build`: Production build
- `npm run test`: Run Vitest tests
- `npm run lint`: ESLint checking

### Testing
- Unit tests with Vitest
- E2E tests with Playwright
- Component testing with Testing Library

## Design System

### Colors
- Primary: Custom purple (#5B3FF8)
- Background: Light theme with card-based layout
- Sidebar: Dark theme (#1A1240) with white text

### Typography
- Display font for headings
- Body font for content
- Consistent sizing and spacing

### Components
- Extensive use of shadcn/ui components
- Custom variants for buttons, inputs, etc.
- Responsive design with Tailwind breakpoints

## Security Considerations

- Environment variables for sensitive config
- Supabase RLS (Row Level Security) policies
- Protected routes with authentication checks
- Secure password handling

## Performance Optimizations

- Vite for fast builds
- React Query for efficient data fetching
- Lazy loading of routes
- Optimized bundle with tree shaking
- Responsive images and assets
